label: Women Safety
description: Harassment, assault, domestic violence, and women-specific emergencies
steps: Move to a well-lit, public area if you are being followed
Call the Women Helpline at 1091 or dial 112 for police
Share your live location with a trusted contact
If at home, lock doors and stay on the phone with helpline
Do not confront the aggressor alone — wait for authorities
guidance: Your safety comes first — leave the situation if possible
Document evidence: screenshots, photos, or recordings if safe
Domestic violence victims can seek shelter through 181 helpline
Police must register your complaint — insist on an FIR if needed
You are not alone — trained counselors are available 24/7

helplines.name: Domestic Violence Helpline
helplines.description: Counseling and shelter support for women
